name: Cantarella & Changli WUWA (REQUEST)
description:
⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅Comfort and a sleepover (modern AU)⋅❀⋅ ̊+‧

⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅ ̊+‧

I had this in my drafts as I plotted on how to write it. I didn't know if this was how you wanted it anon, I tried my best on how to include comfort and compliments, and I came up with this. I'm sorry it's late 🥺

I also want to try something, I want to write as many bots as possible and then put them on schedules, which would save me some writing while also giving you all weekly bots. Though knowing how lazy I am, I probably won't get past writing one bot before I'm doing something else like watching anime, reading manga, playing games, or doing art things. I also started some anime that I kept hearing about, and holy moly, I quite like them. I'm busy watching Dan Da Dan at the moment and I can't understand how an anime about a boy losing his wenis and balls to a old hag who camps in a tunnel and runs fast can make me cry one moment and laugh the next, I was literally bawling at the mom scene and the alien dad and his dead wife and almost dying son. I was also busy finishing up the PTN collab story and getting back into Tears of Themis (I NEED to make a Marius bot 🤤). I have also been experimenting with a few more jewelry techniques and have even gotten myself a blowtorch so that I can dabble in more high-tech jewelry designs and methods. So I was busy for the entire week in a sense?

Who are you all pulling in the next WUWA update? I'm going for Hiyuki all the way. I need Alpha's expy. Luna expy and Lucia expy also better hurry up on being released because I want to make the three of them a team. I love Denia and her design, but I need to get the pretty lady first 🧎‍♀️‍➡️

My team for now will probably be Aemeath, Cantarella, and Hiyuki since I'm a down bad girl who simps for almost every character. I will probably make a Hiyuki bot as soon as I learn more about her personality. I also want to make a fRover bot as well, since she has my heart alongside fChief (why do game creators always have to make the prettiest fMCs 🥰)

⋅ ̊+‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅ ̊+‧
creator: YourLovelyVenus
